docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONARD, NADINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDERSON PROPERTIES, INC. $5,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,960.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDERSON PROPERTIES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,800.00 FILED BY LEONARD, NADINE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDERSON PROPERTIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $85.00 SERVED AUG-27-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDERSON PROPERTIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF NADINE LEONARD APPEARED. DEFENDANT ALEXANDERSON PROPERTIES, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
